recommendations.title: The Strange Thing About the Johnsons
recommendations.overview: A suburban father gets trapped in a one-sided incestuous relationship with his abusive son.

recommendations.title: Midsommar
recommendations.overview: Several friends travel to Sweden to study as anthropologists a summer festival that is held every ninety years in the remote hometown of one of them. What begins as a dream vacation in a place where the sun never sets, gradually turns into a dark nig

recommendations.title: Beau Is Afraid
recommendations.overview: Following the sudden death of his mother, a mild-mannered but anxiety-ridden man confronts his darkest fears as he embarks on an epic odyssey back home.

recommendations.title: Eddington
recommendations.overview: In May of 2020, a standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in Eddington, New Mexico.

recommendations.title: The Others
recommendations.overview: Grace is a religious woman who lives in an old house kept dark because her two children, Anne and Nicholas, have a rare sensitivity to light. When the family begins to suspect the house is haunted, Grace fights to protect her children at any cost in

recommendations.title: We Are What We Are
recommendations.overview: After the death of a patriarch, a family must try to continue on with a disturbing, ritualistic tradition.

recommendations.title: Disappearance at Clifton Hill
recommendations.overview: Following the death of her mother, a young woman returns home to Niagara Falls and becomes entangled in the memory of a kidnapping she claims to have witnessed as a child.

recommendations.title: Companion
recommendations.overview: During a weekend getaway at a secluded lakeside estate, a group of friends finds themselves entangled in a web of secrets, deception, and advanced technology. As tensions rise and loyalties are tested, they uncover unsettling truths about themselves

recommendations.title: While the Wolf's Away
recommendations.overview: A young teen and his misfit group of friends try to escape from a strict boarding school that holds dangerous secrets.

recommendations.title: The Night House
recommendations.overview: Reeling from the unexpected death of her husband, Beth is left alone in the lakeside home he built for her. Soon she begins to uncover her recently deceased husband's disturbing secrets.
